reasoning: The control CP-10(6) focuses on system recovery and reconstitution, emphasizing component protection. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that critical components like etcd have backups configured, and that there are documented disaster recovery plans for pods and clusters. Automated snapshots for cluster state and configurations can help in reconstitution. Additionally, configuring pod anti-affinity can protect against node failures by ensuring pods are distributed across multiple nodes.
title: System Recovery And Reconstitution - System recovery and reconstitution | component protection protect system compone
